VISTA_DOLL.title: Vista Doll
VISTA_DOLL.flavor: Be rich, i will be rich...
VISTA_DOLL.description: Store discount [blue]30%[/blue]. When you enter the store, recover [blue]1[/blue] HP per [gold]10[/gold] gold. Gold from defeating enemies is doubled.
WXW_DOLL.title: WXW Doll
WXW_DOLL.description: When you would die, heal [green]1[/green] HP and gain [blue]999[/blue] block. You gain [blue]99[/blue] block per turn.(work once per combat)
BAIZEALER_DOLL.title: Baizealer Doll
BAIZEALER_DOLL.flavor: The stars will shine with you.
BAIZEALER_DOLL.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]6[/blue] Thorns. Whenever you are attacked, deal [red]1[/red] damage to a random enemy [blue]6[/blue] times.
